title: Hero Build Guide
author: Serenity
description: This guide provides recommended hero build options for both PVP and PVE game modes.
The recommendations are guidelines rather than strict requirements. Players should adapt builds according to the heroes, equipment and resources available to them.
Three two-piece stigmata sets can also be used as an alternative build configuration.

notices.title: Adapt recommendations
notices.description: Gem talents and builds may change depending on the opponent. Do not follow a build blindly; evaluate the situation and adjust.

notices.title: Speed matters
notices.description: Speed determines turn order for every hero. It is especially important for heroes whose skills depend on acting before the enemy.

notices.title: Facing crowd control
notices.description: When facing teams with strong crowd control, the guide recommends considering third talent 3.

notices.title: Annihilation
notices.description: At the time of version 10.2, Annihilation is mainly useful for Pierre, Forest Avatar (Epeius), Mikaela and Orochi.

notices.title: Phantom stigmata
notices.description: Many current heroes and skills invalidate Phantom effects. Phantom should therefore be considered a lower-priority recommendation when alternatives are available.

changes: Added a damage-over-time subsection to the crowd-control section.
Added Heart of Calamity artifact recommendations.
Reassessed hero tiers to reflect the current meta.
Marked relevant heroes as True Damage or Holy Damage.
Added a disclaimer regarding Phantom stigmata.
